description: Benchmarked the hub's routing with the deterministic skill-benchmark and ran a three-lens family deep-review; the review found zero real router defects and root-caused the low first score to a measurement artifact, so the shared harness was re-layered for thin hubs and its negative-scoring corrected (honest router-mode verdict 44 -> 71), a merge-blocking Iron-Law canary was restored, and four cheap defects were fixed
